items.title: Robinhood now lets your AI agents trade stocks
items.summary: Robinhood will let users create a separate account with pre-loaded balance that an agent use to trade
items.reason: AI Coding 领域重要动态，AI Agent 工程化趋势明显。

items.title: DuckDuckGo installs are up 30% as users reject being ‘force-fed’ Google’s AI Search
items.summary: Google overhauled Search at I/O 2026, replacing blue links with AI agents. The backlash has been swift. DuckDuckGo app installs spiked 30% as users seek a way out.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year
items.summary: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG. Its 5x growth in usage over six months indicates the multi-AI-model future is here.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.summary: The feds are raising the alarm about a new category of threat.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: Millions of AI agents imperiled by critical vulnerability in open source package
items.summary: "BadHost" was found in Starlette, a package with 325 million weekly downloads.
